bundled.name: vaevas-workflow
bundled.description: Interview-led brief/KPI/plan/validation/review loop for vaEvas implementation and benchmark work.

bundled.name: vaevas-git-sync
bundled.description: Safe git audit, commit, push, and PR workflow for vaEvas repositories.
recommended_for: avoiding accidental upload of private or bulky files

optional_external.name: experiment-plan
optional_external.why: Turn benchmark or ablation ideas into reproducible experiment plans.

optional_external.name: experiment-audit
optional_external.why: Audit whether an experiment result is reproducible and fairly compared.

optional_external.name: experiment-queue
optional_external.why: Queue long-running A/D/F/G/H/I or model-comparison experiments.

optional_external.name: run-experiment
optional_external.why: Standardize experiment execution and validation logging.

optional_external.name: monitor-experiment
optional_external.why: Monitor long-running overnight or remote experiments.

optional_external.name: analyze-results
optional_external.why: Summarize EVAS/Spectre result tables and failure taxonomies.

optional_external.name: ablation-planner
optional_external.why: Design controlled comparisons such as grep vs RAG or F vs G vs I.

optional_external.name: paper-write
optional_external.why: Convert verified results into paper sections.

optional_external.name: paper-compile
optional_external.why: Check whether paper artifacts compile and references are consistent.

optional_external.name: research-lit
optional_external.why: Collect related work for Verilog-A, analog behavioral modeling, RAG, and LLM repair.
